text.title: Trade-off Stakeholder Communication Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: ADR-0023 deferring Redis cache to Phase 2 — produces a 4-artefact briefing that converges on the same read-latency risk.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo architect is committing the team to Postgres-only persistence for Phase 1 and deferring the Redis cache to Phase 2. Decision is Type-1 (touches every service). Stakeholders: CEO (exec), PM (roadmap), 3 backend engineers, oncall lead (ops).

section.title: Input — decision record
section.code: ADR-0023 — Persistence layer for Phase 1 Options evaluated: A. Postgres-only — ops surface small, p95 ceiling ~5x load B. Postgres + Redis day-one — ops surface large, p95 headroom ~30x load C. SQLite + Postgres later — ops nil, blocks multi-region Chosen: A Reversibility: type-1 (cache rollout = 4 weeks) Key downside: read-latency ceiling around 5x current load

section.title: Output — bundle (abbreviated)
